reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención y muy caro una gaseosa de $645 y si la intención tuya es pasar al baño toda una Odisea ya que tenés que avisarle a las playeras para que te hagan la puerta con un pulsador y ya está eso te re measte

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible and a soda was ridiculously expensive at $645. And if you want to go to the bathroom, it's a complete ordeal because you have to tell the attendants to open the door with a push button, and that's it. It was so frustrating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnc2R2c1dnEAE
